item.title: The Future of Quality Assurance: Level Up Your Career with UiPath Test Automation 🚀
item.description:
🚀 UiPath Test Automation Demo Session | Live
Welcome to our live demo on UiPath Test Automation!
In this session, you’ll get a clear understanding of how automation testing works in real-world scenarios and how you can start building skills in this high-demand domain.
👨‍🏫 Trainer: Mogal Jilan (7+ Years Experience)
⏰ Time: 8:00 A.M.
💡 What you’ll explore in this session: ✔ Introduction to UiPath Test Automation ✔ Real-time use cases ✔ Industry applications ✔ Overview of the training program
💬 Join our WhatsApp Community: https://chat.whatsapp.com/IFGbkooH4GjGUCAcwDeePT
🔔 Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more content on Automation & RPA!
#UiPath #TestAutomation #RPA #AutomationTesting #LiveDemo #CareerGrowth #TechSkills #RPAVAULT

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Over Your Dead Body’
item.description: In theaters on April 24 is ‘Over Your Dead Body’, an adaptation of a dark Norwegian comedy that stars Jason Segel (‘Shrinking’) and Samara Weaving (‘Ready or Not 2: Here I Come’) as a couple who have deadly plans for each other.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Michael’
item.description: Opening in theaters on April 24th is the long-awaited biopic ‘Michael’, which focuses on the life and career of legendary musician Michael Jackson and was directed by Antoine Fuqua (‘The Equalizer’).

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Hamlet’ (2026)
item.description: In theaters on April 10 is ‘Hamlet’, a fresh update of William Shakespeare’s famous tragedy, which features Riz Ahmed (‘Sound of Metal’), who plays a version of the troubled Dane, here the heir to an elite South Asian empire in modern-day London.

item.description: New Episode: From S04E01 720p HEVC x265-MeGusta EZTV

item.title: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off.

Scott Pilgrim meets the girl of his dreams, Ramona Flowers, only to find out her seven evil exes stand in the way of their love.

item.title: Memory of a Killer
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Memory of a Killer.

Memory of a Killer is a dramatic thriller about a hitman who develops early onset Alzheimer's. Angelo lives a double life as an assassin and a family man - which all worked out well until he was hit with early onset Alzheimer's. Now his worlds are colliding, putting his family in danger.

item.title: DTF St. Louis
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: DTF St. Louis.

DTF St. Louis is a darkly comedic limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise, that leads to one of them ending up dead.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Mother Mary’
item.description: Opening in theaters in limited release on April 17 and expanding on April 24 is ‘Mother Mary,’ written and directed by David Lowery and starring Anne Hathaway, Michaela Coel, Hunter Schafer, Atheena Frizzell, Kaia Gerber, Jessica Brown Findlay, Alba Baptista, Sian Clifford, and FKA Twigs.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Lee Cronin's The Mummy’
item.description: Opening in theaters on April 17 is ‘Lee Cronin's The Mummy,’ written and directed by Lee Cronin and starring Jack Reynor, Laia Costa, May Calamawy, Natalie Grace, Shylo Molina, Billie Roy, and Verónica Falcón.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Normal’
item.description: In theaters on April 10 is ‘Normal’, a new action comedy starring Bob Odenkirk (‘Nobody’), directed by Ben Wheatley (‘Free Fire’).The cast also includes Lena Headey (‘Game of Thrones’), Billy MacLellan (‘The Silence’), Henry Winkler (‘Barry’), Ryan Allen (‘In the Shadow of the Moon’), Jess McLeod (‘One of Us is Lying’), Reena Jolly (‘The Best Christmas Pageant Ever’) and Brendan Fletcher (‘Violent Night’).

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Lorne’
item.description: Opening in theaters on April 17th is the new documentary ‘Lorne’, which was directed by Morgan Neville (‘Man on the Run’) and chronicles the life and career of ‘Saturday Night Live’ creator Lorne Michaels.

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: RPA UIPath, PA & Agentic Ai Hands-on Demo
item.description:
🚀 Kickstart Your RPA Journey with UiPath & Power Automate!
Welcome to our official training session by RPAVault Trainings 🎯 This session is designed to help you build a strong foundation in RPA (Robotic Process Automation) using UiPath & Power Automate.
💡 What you’ll learn in this session:
Complete Infrastructure Setup & Installation
Step-by-step UiPath environment configuration
Introduction to Power Automate (PA)
Guidance on Certification Initiation
Best practices to start your automation career
🎓 Whether you're a beginner or aspiring automation developer, this session will help you take your first serious step toward a high-demand tech career.
🔗 Join our WhatsApp Community for updates & support: https://chat.whatsapp.com/G1BiUwmPS3ZLYJgnTlGBS3
💳 Enroll for upcoming sessions: https://rpavault.com/training/rpa-training-payment/
🏫 Trainer: Raghava Tadikonda RPA UiPath Certified Trainer 🏅🏅🏅
---
🔥 Don’t just learn — build real skills, work on projects, and grow your career in automation!
#RPAVault #UiPath #RPA #PowerAutomate #Automation #TechCareer #LearnRPA #UiPathTraining #AutomationCareer

item.title: RPA UIPath, PA & Agentic Ai Hands-on Demo
item.description:
In this session, we dive deeper into real-time automation using UiPath, Power Automate, and Agentic AI concepts. This hands-on demo is designed to give you practical exposure to building automation workflows and understanding how AI is transforming the RPA landscape.
💡 What you’ll learn: End-to-end automation using UiPath Power Automate workflows in real-time Introduction to Agentic AI in automation Industry use cases & practical scenarios Career guidance in RPA & AI
👩‍💻 Whether you're a beginner or looking to upskill, this session will help you move closer to a career in automation.
📌 Who should watch: Freshers & job seekers IT / Non-IT professionals Anyone interested in RPA & AI
👉 Join our WhatsApp community for updates & training details: https://chat.whatsapp.com/G1BiUwmPS3ZLYJgnTlGBS3?mode=gi_t
🔥 Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more sessions!

item.title: RPA UIPath, PA & Agentic Ai Hands-on Demo
item.description:
Welcome to our 1st Demo Session where we introduce you to the world of Robotic Process Automation (RPA) using UiPath, along with Power Automate and the future of automation with Agentic AI.
💡 In this session, you will learn: ✔ What is RPA and how it works ✔ Introduction to UiPath tools & interface ✔ Real-time automation use cases ✔ Basics of Power Automate workflows ✔ Overview of Agentic AI ✔ Career opportunities in RPA & AI
🎯 This demo is perfect for: • Freshers • Career switchers • Automation & AI enthusiasts
🔥 Join Our WhatsApp Community for Updates & Support: 👉 https://chat.whatsapp.com/GmXZMiS4rzqAXcJ Get hands-on training with real-time projects & job-oriented guidance.
👉 DM for enrollment details 📌 Don’t forget to: 👍 Like | 💬 Comment | 🔔 Subscribe
#RPA #UiPath #PowerAutomate #AgenticAI #Automation #RPATraining #CareerGrowth

item.title: TV Review: ‘Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord’
item.description: Arriving on Disney+ on April 6 with the first two episodes (and six more to follow on a mostly weekly schedule) is ‘Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord’, the latest step in Dave Filoni’s animated adventures set in the galaxy far, far away.

item.title: TV Review: ‘Hacks’ Season 5
item.description: Arriving on HBO Max on April 6 with the first episode (of 10) is the fifth and final season of ‘Hacks’, which returns us to the world of caustic, charismatic comedian Deborah Vance, as brought to award-winning life by Jean Smart.

item.title: OpenClaw Notion Setup: 11 erste Schritte
item.description: OpenClaw mit Notion richtig einrichten. 11 Schritte zu Memory-Architektur, Webhooks und Agent-Koordination – für echte Autonomie ab Woche eins.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘They Will Kill You’
item.description: Opening in theaters on March 27 is ‘They Will Kill You,’ directed by Kirill Sololov from a script by Sokolov and Alex Litvak, starring Zazie Beetz, Myha'la, Paterson Joseph, Tom Felton, Heather Graham, and Patricia Arquette.

item.title: Notion AI-Transformation: Die Alva Case Study
item.description: Wie Alva Labs ein KI-bereites Notion-Fundament aufgebaut hat, bevor sie ihre KI-Ambitionen skaliert haben – eine Case Study zur organisatorischen Transformation.

item.title: TV Review: ‘Daredevil: Born Again’ Season 2
item.description: Arriving on Disney+ on March 11 with the first episode of its second season (with the remaining seven arriving weekly) is ‘Daredevil: Born Again’, which brings back lawyer Matt Murdock (Charlie Cox) has he battles the powerful Wilson “Kingpin” Fisk (Vincent D’Onofrio), who is ruling New York as mayor with an iron fist.

item.title: Die Judgment Economy: Expertise für KI lesbar machen
item.description: Je besser Du bist, desto schwieriger ist es, KI einzusetzen. Lerne, warum Lesbarkeit der Schlüssel ist – und wie Crawl, Walk, Run dabei hilft.

item.description: Drei schlaflose Nächte mit OpenClaw und Notion: Wie ein KI-Organigramm aussieht, KI-zu-KI-Kollaboration – und was nach Tag drei noch bricht.

item.title: Wie Notion KI-Agenten intern einsetzt
item.description: Notion KI-Agenten prägen heute Notions interne Workflows: Self-Healing Wikis, Agent Orchestrators und Workers – lerne, was dein Team übernehmen kann.

item.title: DMV
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: DMV.

DMV is set at the place everyone dreads going most: the DMV. Our quirky and lovable characters are making minimum wage, doing a thankless job where customers are annoyed before they even walk in the door. Good thing they have each other.

item.title: Rooster
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Rooster.

Rooster follows a middle aged author navigating a complicated relationship with his daughter.

item.title: Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: TV Review: ‘Scarpetta’
item.description: Arriving on Prime Video on March 11 with all eight episodes of its first season is ‘Scarpetta’, the adaptation of Patricia Cornwell’s successful book series, starring Nicole Kidman as the forensic pathologist investigating a mysterious serial killer.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Reminders of Him’
item.description: In theaters on March 13 is ‘Reminders of Him’, the latest adaptation of a novel by prolific romance/melodrama author Colleen Hoover, which stars Maika Monroe ('Longlegs') as a young woman looking to put her life back together.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Project Hail Mary’
item.description: Opening in theaters on March 20 is ‘Project Hail Mary,’ directed by Phil Lord and Chris Miller (‘Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse’) and starring Oscar nominees Ryan Gosling (‘Barbie’) and Sandra Hüller (‘Anatomy of a Fall’), as well as Lionel Boyce (‘The Bear’), Ken Leung (‘Joker: Folie à Deux’), Milana Vayntrub (‘Ghostbusters’), and James Ortiz.

item.title: Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action | Power BI Training | Data Analytics
item.description:
In this session, we explore Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action and demonstrate how Power BI transforms raw data into meaningful insights through interactive dashboards.
The session covers how filters, slicers, drill-down features, and dynamic visuals help users explore data and make better business decisions.
This session is conducted by Mr. Prashyuth, who has 13+ years of experience in the IT industry, sharing practical insights on how Power BI is used in real-world projects.
In this session you will learn:
• How interactive Power BI dashboards work • Using filters and slicers effectively • Drill-down analysis in dashboards • Building visually engaging reports • Understanding the Power BI learning path and career opportunities in Data Analytics
If you are interested in learning Power BI and building a career in Data Analytics, this session will give you a clear understanding of the possibilities.
🔗 Join our WhatsApp community for updates and learning resources: https://chat.whatsapp.com/LNFZbPxPYn52dGMydLSw1J

item.title: Movie Review: 'Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man'
item.description: Coming to theaters on March 6 ahead of streaming on Netflix March 20, 'Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man' sees the return of Tommy Shelby, played by Cillian Murphy. The film also stars Barry Keoghan, Rebecca Ferguson, and Tim Roth.

item.title: Data to Dashboards: Power BI Live Session
item.description:
📊 Data to Dashboards – Power BI Live Session
In this session, we explored the fundamentals of Business Intelligence (BI) and how organizations transform raw data into meaningful insights using Power BI dashboards.
In today’s data-driven world, understanding how data is collected, processed, and visualized is an essential skill. Tools like Power BI help businesses turn raw data into interactive reports and dashboards that support better decision-making.
🔎 What you’ll learn in this session: • What is Business Intelligence (BI) • Benefits of BI in modern organizations • Data Collection from multiple sources • Understanding the ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) process • How raw data is converted into dashboards • Introduction to Power BI and data visualization
👨‍💻 Session conducted by an industry expert with 13+ years of IT experience, sharing practical insights from real-world projects.
📲 Want to learn more about Data Analytics & Power BI? Join our WhatsApp community for updates on upcoming sessions, learning resources, and career guidance.
👉 Join WhatsApp Group: https://chat.whatsapp.com/LNFZbPxPYn52dGMydLSw1J
📌 Stay connected with RPAVAULT for more sessions on Data Analytics, Automation, and emerging technologies.
#PowerBI #BusinessIntelligence #DataAnalytics #PowerBIDashboard #DataVisualization #RPAVAULT

item.title: Movie Review: ‘The Bride!’
item.description: Opening in theaters on March 6 is ‘The Bride!,’ written and directed by Maggie Gyllenhaal and starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale, Peter Sarsgaard, Penélope Cruz, John Magaro, Jake Gyllenhaal, Jeannie Berlin, and Annette Bening.

item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.title: Heated Rivalry
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Heated Rivalry.

Two hockey players must decide if there is room in their fiercely competitive world for real love.

item.title: Scrubs (2026)
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scrubs (2026).

Old friends JD and Turk scrub in together for the first time in a long time, learning that medicine has changed; interns have changed; but their bromance has stood the test of time.

item.title: Power Bi Training batch starting- RPAVault! #rpavault #automationtraining #powerbi_training
RPA Workshop: Building Flows with Power Automate & UiPath (9 Feb 2026, 8:00 AM IST)
RPA UiPath Hands‑on Demo (Feb 6, 8:00 AM IST)
item.description:
This video is the recording of the second demo session from our UiPath RPA Training program by RPAVault.
In this session, you’ll get clarity on: What UiPath RPA is and how it’s used in real projects
Training flow and learning roadmap Real-time automation scenarios Career opportunities in RPA Participant questions and answers This session is useful for freshers, career switchers, and working professionals who want to build a strong foundation in UiPath automation.
👨‍🏫 Trainer: Mr. Raghava Tadikonda (11+ years of RPA experience) 🎓 Trusted by: 5000+ learners
Watch the full recording to understand how UiPath can help you move forward in your automation journey.

item.title: 🚀 UiPath RPA Training Batch – Live Demo Session | RPAVAULT
item.description:
🚀 UiPath RPA Training Batch – Live Demo Session | RPAVAULT
Welcome to our live demo session of UiPath RPA Training by RPAVAULT. This session is designed for beginners, working professionals, and career switchers who want to build a strong career in Robotic Process Automation (RPA) using UiPath. 🔍 What you’ll learn in this demo: ✅ Introduction to RPA & UiPath ✅ Real-time project overview ✅ UiPath tool features & use cases ✅ Career opportunities in RPA ✅ Course structure & learning roadmap ✅ Q&A with the trainer 👨‍🏫 Trainer: Mr. Raghava Tadikonda ✔ 11+ years of real-time RPA experience ✔ Trained 5000+ learners ✔ Industry-focused & job-oriented training 🎯 Why RPAVAULT? 🔹 Practical, real-time training 🔹 Interview-focused learning 🔹 Resume & mock interview support 🔹 100% job-oriented guidance
To help you with **daily job updates on UiPath and other RPA roles**, please join my WhatsApp group using this link: https://chat.whatsapp.com/EINB7TEeNEDE0Jnx2veUxy
If you are interested in **remote job opportunities across different locations and technologies**, please join this WhatsApp group: https://chat.whatsapp.com/DhNNwU1D7ouAc3aRDXf4OU
If you want to **know my upcoming training batches**, please join this WhatsApp group for training updates, demo session links, and batch schedules: https://chat.whatsapp.com/G1BiUwmPS3ZLYJgnTlGBS3
Feel free to share these groups with your friends who are looking for jobs and training. 🔔 Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more RPA & automation learning sessions.
#UiPath #RPA #UiPathTraining #RPAVAULT #AutomationTesting #CareerInRPA #LiveDemo #UiPathDemo

item.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms.

A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

item.title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy.

Star Trek: Starfleet Academy is set in the 32nd century, a time period in the far-future of the Star Trek franchise where Starfleet and the United Federation of Planets are recovering from a cataclysmic event, as depicted in Star Trek: Discovery. It introduces viewers to a young group of cadets who come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

item.title: Azure Data Engineer Demo Meeting
RPA Power Automate Second Session
RPA Power Automate First Session
RPA Power Automate First Session
The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City.

The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City takes viewers into an undiscovered world that is about so much more than religion, although the Mormon church is undeniably engrained in the culture. In the majestic mountains of Utah is a hidden social circle made up of successful women who have created their own paradise filled with luxury homes, shopping sprees and multi-million-dollar businesses and brands. With Hollywood's exclusive Sundance Film Festival in their backyards, these Type-A power-brokers are accustomed to rubbing elbows with A-listers and what party list you are on means everything. They have mastered running wildly successful enterprises by day and enjoy après ski at the finest resorts by night, all the while raising extraordinary and unconventional families. Here perfection is not an aspiration, it's a mandate. They hold themselves and each other to an extremely high standard and never hold back when things go sideways, but lord knows they are always there for each other when they need it most.

item.title: Tracker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Tracker.

Tracker features lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw, who roams the country as a "reward seeker," using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement to solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family.

item.title: The War Between the Land and the Sea
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The War Between the Land and the Sea.

When a fearsome and ancient species emerges from the ocean, dramatically revealing themselves to humanity, an international crisis is triggered. With the entire population at risk, UNIT step into action as the land and sea wage war.

item.title: Spartacus: House of Ashur
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spartacus: House of Ashur.

Spartacus: House of Ashur poses the question: What if Ashur hadn't died on Mount Vesuvius at the end of Spartacus: Vengeance? And what if he had been gifted the gladiator school once owned by Batiatus in return for aiding the Romans in killing Spartacus and ending the slave rebellion?

item.title: Blue Lights
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Blue Lights.

For three police recruits in Belfast, the pressure is immense. Facing criminal gangs and divided communities, they don't know who to trust. The odds are they won't all make it.

item.title: 14 Essential Upgrades to Supercharge Your Notion Workspace in 2025
item.description: Here are our favourite Apps for Notion in 2025 to make your Workspace even more powerful and extend what Notion can do for you.
